hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *pnpm-lock.yaml|*/public/images/*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked by project hook: do not edit pnpm-lock.yaml or public/images/* directly. Run pnpm install or replace the asset outside Claude."}}' ;; esac
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx) pnpm type-check 2>&1 ;; esac
